pr.title: Record: 11L Depth Recurrence + Discriminative Pre-Quant TTT (8xH100) — val_bpb 1.0887 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Depth recurrence reruns blocks 4/5 and adds discriminative pre-quant TTT with per-block LR scaling before GPTQ quantization.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Discriminative pre-quant TTT performs AdamW adaptation on validation chunks before GPTQ quantization.
techniques: Depth recurrence reuses blocks 4 and 5 so 11 layers execute 13 passes with shared weights
Discriminative pre-quant TTT fine-tunes on val chunks with per-block LR scaling prior to int6 GPTQ
